features: Inspired by Italy – A luxurious Eau de Parfum capturing the scent of sunlit Tuscan vineyards with ripe fig, grape, and soft florals.
Multi-Layered Fragrance Profile – Top: Grape & gardenia; Heart: Fig, orange blossom & mimosa; Base: Sandalwood, amber & vanilla.
Unisex & Elegant – A clean, light fragrance with fruity warmth and floral notes—ideal for women and men who love sophisticated scents.
Long-Lasting & Day-Perfect – Designed to last for hours, this scent evolves gently on the skin and is perfect for everyday wear.
Gift-Ready Presentation – Comes in a beautifully designed 100ml glass bottle with stunning fold-out packaging—ideal for birthdays, Mother’s Day, or self-care.
